dj_text: Rewind! [Deleted video] was that good. Now Gilli - Orale (live) | P3 Guld 2015! A couple more lined up after this.
commercial_text: This is a test of the Emergency Radio System. If this were an actual emergency, you'd hear me screaming. It's not.
hijack_text: Hey cosmic sailors, hold onto Yer ships!
recovery_text: Someone's been poking holes in reality. I'm looking at you, chat.
title: Gilli - Orale (live) | P3 Guld 2015
